title: Not Negotiating Your Salary Costs You $1,500,000
hook: You had one conversation you were too scared to have — and it just cost you a million and a half dollars.
angle: Starting salary anchors every future raise, bonus, and 401k match for decades. One negotiated bump at 25 compounds to six figures. This isn't motivational — it's documented math.
audience: 22-40 year olds early to mid career who've never negotiated or feel anxious about it
key_numbers: 63% of workers never negotiate their starting salary
$634,000 compounded gain from one $5K raise at 25 (7% return, 40 years)
$1,500,000 lifetime earnings gap between negotiators and non-negotiators
